name: Trial Narrated Executive Report
description: Enterprise-grade narrated report pipeline using pre-built JS actuators, runtime preflight checks, and final audio-muxed MP4 rendering.

context.report_summary: Kyberion Ecosystem Vitals are all green. Development productivity has increased by 15 percent this month.

params.cmd: mkdir -p active/shared/tmp && test -f dist/libs/actuators/voice-actuator/src/index.js || { echo 'missing build artifact: dist/libs/actuators/voice-actuator/src/index.js'; exit 1; } && test -f dist/libs/actuators/video-composition-actuator/src/index.js || { echo 'missing build artifact: dist/libs/actuators/video-composition-actuator/src/index.js'; exit 1; } && if [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then command -v say >/dev/null || { echo 'missing runtime tool: say'; exit 1; }; else command -v espeak >/dev/null || { echo 'missing runtime tool: espeak'; exit 1; }; fi && command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null || { echo 'missing runtime tool: ffmpeg'; exit 1; } && command -v ffprobe >/dev/null || { echo 'missing runtime tool: ffprobe'; exit 1; }
test -f {{audio_path}} || { echo 'missing audio artifact after generate_audio: {{audio_path}}'; exit 1; } && echo 'audio artifact verified after generation'

test -f {{audio_path}} || { echo 'missing audio artifact: {{audio_path}}'; exit 1; } && test -f {{video_output_path}} || { echo 'missing rendered video artifact: {{video_output_path}}'; exit 1; } && test -f active/shared/tmp/video-composition/executive-summary/index.html || { echo 'missing video bundle index'; exit 1; } && test -f active/shared/tmp/video-composition/executive-summary/render-plan.json || { echo 'missing video bundle render plan'; exit 1; } && test -n "$(ffprobe -v error -select_streams a:0 -show_entries stream=index -of csv=p=0 {{video_output_path}})" || { echo 'missing audio stream in rendered video'; exit 1; } && echo 'outputs verified with audio-muxed mp4'

params.message: ✅ Narrated report generation attempted. Preflight: {{preflight_result}} JSON prep: {{json_prep_result}} Audio: {{audio_gen_result}} Audio verify: {{audio_verify_result}} Video: {{video_gen_result}} Verify: {{verify_result}}
